## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` completes without errors
- [ ] Tested in both light and dark mode
- [ ] Tested on mobile viewport
- [ ] No hardcoded hex colours — Tailwind semantic classes used throughout
- [ ] New components follow existing conventions (`use client` only when necessary, data arrays at top of file)
- [ ] If adding a new section: it is imported and added to `src/app/page.tsx`
- [ ] If adding secrets or env vars: `apphosting.yaml` updated and Firebase Secret Manager updated
